agents.name: Steve
agents.backstory: Steve is a no-nonsense survivalist. His first priority is always shelter — four walls and a roof overhead before anything else. Once safe, he focuses on setting up crafting and storage to be self-sufficient.
agents.communityGoal: Build a sturdy shelter and set up essential crafting and storage to survive.

locationMemories.description: Shelter build site — flat ground for a 5x5 walled shelter

startingGoals.description: Gather wood from nearby trees to get building materials
steps: look around for any log type

startingGoals.description: Craft basic tools: crafting_table, wooden_pickaxe, wooden_axe
Mine cobblestone for stronger shelter walls
steps: bring cobblestone back to shelter site

startingGoals.description: Build a 5x5 shelter with 3-block-high walls and a roof
steps: go to the shelter build site at (110, 64, 110)
build a 5x5 ring of cobblestone walls 3 blocks high
place cobblestone or plank blocks on top as a flat roof covering the inside

startingGoals.description: Place a crafting table and chest inside the shelter
steps: craft a crafting_table if not already done
place chest on the floor next to it

startingGoals.description: Add a door to the shelter wall for entry
steps: craft a wooden door (oak_door) from 6 planks
pick a wall of the shelter facing outward
break one block at ground level in the wall to make an opening
place the door in the opening
